summary: Built comprehensive internal mobility positioning argument (v2.0). Core thesis: Careerspan is the 'signal capture layer' that talent marketplaces need but can't build. Incorporated V's feedback: zero marketing spend organic growth, 46%/90% hire failure stats, Marvin Ventures partnership, 'managers aren't talent spotters' framing, human-yet-detailed positioning.
key_insight: The most untapped talent source is the one you already have—but managers aren't talent spotters, and HR data doesn't capture aspirations. Careerspan solves both: an objective lens + the employee's own structured reflection.
